# Nobi AI

> Nobi is a conversational website assistant that helps convert more site visitors with modern search and support. It combines product search, automated support, and lead generation tools in one assistant.

## What Nobi Does

Nobi sits on a business's website and acts as a conversational assistant for visitors. It understands what visitors mean, answers questions from the business's own data, helps people find the right products or information, and captures high-intent leads when a visitor is ready for follow-up.

### Core Capabilities

- **Modern search**: Plugs into a merchant's product catalog and can act as the site's main search engine or as a sales assistant that helps visitors find the right products. Nobi uses semantic search and AI-based filtering to understand natural-language queries like "brown boots for wide feet under $200."
- **Automated support**: Uses the business's connected knowledge base, website content, documents, and policies to answer customer questions before they become support tickets.
- **Lead generation**: Detects and captures high-intent prospects in conversation and sends visitor leads when they are collected.
- **Product and page Q&A**: Answers product, sizing, shipping, service, and policy questions without making visitors dig through pages or wait for support.
- **Flexible placement**: Search bar, PDP assistant, collection pages, modals, suggestion pills, or triggered from any button via JavaScript API.
- **AI agent reach**: Publishes agent-readable content and an MCP endpoint so external AI agents can learn about and interact with the business.

### Verticals

Nobi started in ecommerce and Shopify, but the platform works beyond ecommerce for businesses that want better website search, automated support, lead capture, or an AI agent on their site.

## Proven Results

Nobi has outperformed the default shopping experience in every A/B test run to date:

- **$1M+** incremental revenue for Lucchese in year one (33x ROI)
- **+21.3%** revenue per searcher for UNTUCKit vs. their prior search tool
- **+17.1%** conversion rate lift for UNTUCKit (17.6% vs 15.0%)
- **+21.7%** conversion improvement for Kilte vs. Shopify default search
- **Up to +21.7%** conversion lift in A/B tests, including against other modern search experiences
- **2.5x** more likely to convert — Nobi searchers vs. non-Nobi visitors (combined Lucchese + UNTUCKit A/B data)
- **17–22%** consistent conversion improvement across customers vs. prior search tool

## Customers

Trusted by brands including UNTUCKit, Lucchese, Kilte, TOOLUP, Faherty, and Alps & Meters.

## Pricing

Starts at $25/month. Includes up to 2,500 AI search interactions and 250 assistant messages per month. 30-day free trial. No setup fees.

## MCP Server

Nobi provides an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server so AI agents can interact with Nobi's own business agent:

mcp-server: https://api.nobi.ai/.well-known/mcp/460cbe82-9195-424f-a616-b1cb3e3caca0.json?source=llms_txt&utm_source=llms_txt&utm_medium=mcp&utm_campaign=mcp_discovery

Agents that support MCP should fetch the manifest above and use the returned RPC endpoint. Nobi preserves the source tags from the manifest URL into the RPC endpoint so agent-originated questions can be attributed correctly.

Available tools:
- ask_question: Ask questions about Nobi — pricing, features, how it works, or anything else.
- book_demo: Request a demo with the Nobi team.
